title: Course: COSC 150 - Computational Science and Data Analysis
description: Introduces undergraduates to computational and analytical tools/techniques for analyzing and communicating scientific knowledge through laboratory exercises and lectures reinforcing STEM concepts. Examines various software tools applicable across STEM disciplines.
content:
COSC 150 - Computational Science and Data Analysis
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: None
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Introduces undergraduates to computational and analytical tools/techniques for analyzing and communicating scientific knowledge through laboratory exercises and lectures reinforcing STEM concepts. Examines various software tools applicable across STEM disciplines.

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55567
